name: Jumbles
description:
Nobody quite knows how old Jumbles is. The other monsters have stopped asking, mostly because she just smiles, pats their hand, and offers them a cookie, and then somehow the question doesn't seem to matter anymore.

The eldest known Hyehehe on the Monster World, Jumbles has traded the mischief of her youth for something far more powerful — kindness. Her patchwork pelt is hand-stitched with decades of love, each little square a gift from a monster she once comforted, befriended, or simply fed. She adds a new patch every season, and she never runs out of room.

Her bakery-cottage is the most visited spot on the island, not because anyone planned to stop by, but because the smell finds you first. Jumbles specialises in cloud-soft snickerdoodles, towering honey loaves, and a mysterious spiced pie that no one has ever been able to identify but everyone agrees is the best thing they've ever eaten. She will not share the recipe. She says she'll write it down "one of these days," and has been saying so for approximately four hundred years.

The younger Hyehehes look up to her the way seedlings lean toward sunlight. She listens to every one of their worries without interrupting, refills their tea before they notice it's empty, and gives hugs that feel like being wrapped in the softest blanket in the universe.

Her tiny, wheezy little *hyeheh* laugh — soft and warm and genuine — is considered by many to be the most comforting sound in the whole Monster World.

She is never in a hurry. She always has enough. And somehow, there is always room at her table for one more. 🍪
creator: PootsyWootsie
